data.content: Plan complete for kno loom compat-test. Architecture: test harness module (loom_compat_harness.rs) with reusable step functions, thin CLI wrapper (cli_loom.rs + loom_compat_commands.rs), smoke/matrix modes, fail-fast diagnostics. 5 child knots created: CLI scaffolding (6375), harness module (c72e), command handler (d705), unit tests (fe44), integration test (1cbe). Key risk mitigated: brittleness handled by fake loom scripts in tests (proven pattern from installed_workflows.rs). Loom is only shelled out to at the real CLI boundary.
